news.title:
Top stock picks: Sona Comstar, Suzlon, Indian Bank, Tata Power, MCX for April 15, 2026.
Analysts recommend these stocks based on sector growth; stop loss advised to mitigate risks.
news.summary:

news.title:
Sona BLW Precision Forgings gains over 2% despite Sensex/Nifty falling ~1% amid global uncertainties.
Analysts recommend BUY at ₹569 with stop loss at ₹538, citing strong fundamentals and positive technical indicators.
news.summary:
Sona BLW Precision Forgings gains over 2% despite Sensex/Nifty falling ~1% amid global uncertainties.
Analysts recommend BUY at ₹569 with stop loss at ₹538, citing strong fundamentals and positive technical indicators.

news.title:
Experts recommend holding Ather Energy, HDFC Bank; buying Vikram Solar, Balu Forge in staggered manner.
Rapid fire: Sell GAIL, Info Edge; Buy UNO Minda, Sona BLW; Hold Asian Paints, HAL, Tata Chemicals.
news.summary:
Experts recommend holding Ather Energy, HDFC Bank; buying Vikram Solar, Balu Forge in staggered manner.
Rapid fire: Sell GAIL, Info Edge; Buy UNO Minda, Sona BLW; Hold Asian Paints, HAL, Tata Chemicals.

news.title:
Sona BLW, Ashok Leyland, Cummins, Exide, and IGL led midcap gains.
Saatvik Green surged 10% on securing a ₹109 crore Solar PV module order.

news.title:
Sona Comstar achieves 500M differential gears, 10M assemblies milestone.
Milestones highlight Sona Comstar's rise as a global auto components supplier.
news.summary:
Sona Comstar achieves 500M differential gears, 10M assemblies milestone.
Milestones highlight Sona Comstar's rise as a global auto components supplier.

news.title:
Sona BLW estimates Sona Comstar's global differential gear market share to rise to 8.7% by CY25.
This marks growth from 4.5% in 2019, indicating improving competitiveness and customer relationships.
news.summary:
Sona BLW estimates Sona Comstar's global differential gear market share to rise to 8.7% by CY25.
This marks growth from 4.5% in 2019, indicating improving competitiveness and customer relationships.

news.title:
Sona BLW produced 500M differential gears, 10M assemblies since inception.
Expected 8.7% global market share in differential gears by 2025; strong BEV presence.
news.summary:
Sona BLW produced 500M differential gears, 10M assemblies since inception.
Expected 8.7% global market share in differential gears by 2025; strong BEV presence.

news.title:
Sona BLW plans ₹622M investment to boost gear production capacity.
The expansion aims to add 4.1M gears to its output.
news.summary:
Sona BLW plans ₹622M investment to boost gear production capacity.
The expansion aims to add 4.1M gears to its output.

news.title:
Sona BLW Precision Forgings Ltd presented at Bernstein Innovators Conference on 12 March 2026.
The presentation showcased advancements in EPIC mobility, robotics, and AI-driven manufacturing innovations.
news.summary:
Sona BLW Precision Forgings Ltd presented at Bernstein Innovators Conference on 12 March 2026.

news.title:
Sona BLW shares rose 4% after BoFA upgraded to 'buy', citing three growth engines.
BoFA raised target to ₹640, expects 20% revenue CAGR FY26-28; EPS growth at 23% CAGR.
news.summary:
Sona BLW shares rose 4% after BoFA upgraded to 'buy', citing three growth engines.
BoFA raised target to ₹640, expects 20% revenue CAGR FY26-28; EPS growth at 23% CAGR.

news.title:
Iran war disrupts Indian auto parts exports; industry seeks govt help for financial support and energy access like LPG/PNG.
Auto component firms face 20-40% logistics cost surge; stocks like Samvardhana Motherson, Sona Comstar, Bosch down 4-11%.
news.summary:
Iran war disrupts Indian auto parts exports; industry seeks govt help for financial support and energy access like LPG/PNG.
Auto component firms face 20-40% logistics cost surge; stocks like Samvardhana Motherson, Sona Comstar, Bosch down 4-11%.

news.title:
Sona BLW Precision Forgings sees NSE block trade of ~1,004,543 shares at Rs. 531.75.
Total transaction value of the block trade amounts to Rs. 53.42 crores.
news.summary:
Sona BLW Precision Forgings sees NSE block trade of ~1,004,543 shares at Rs. 531.75.

news.title:
Tata Motors, Bharat Forge, Sona BLW, and others may benefit from reduced US tariffs under the India-US trade deal.
IDBI Bank received bids for privatization; PB Fintech denied QIP plans, and Tata Steel reported strong Q3 net profit growth.
news.summary:
Tata Motors, Bharat Forge, Sona BLW, and others may benefit from reduced US tariffs under the India-US trade deal.
IDBI Bank received bids for privatization; PB Fintech denied QIP plans, and Tata Steel reported strong Q3 net profit growth.

news.title:
Jefferies identifies Adani Group as key beneficiary of India-US trade deal due to US exposure.
Other gainers include Sona BLW, Bharat Forge, Navin Fluorine, PI Industries, SRF, and Welspun Living.
news.summary:
Jefferies identifies Adani Group as key beneficiary of India-US trade deal due to US exposure.
Other gainers include Sona BLW, Bharat Forge, Navin Fluorine, PI Industries, SRF, and Welspun Living.

news.title:
Sona BLW reported revenue of ₹1,200 Cr, EBITDA ₹300 Cr, marking its best quarter with 39% YoY growth.
BEV contributed 38% to sales; India revenue share rose to 55% with railway diversification.
news.summary:
Sona BLW reported revenue of ₹1,200 Cr, EBITDA ₹300 Cr, marking its best quarter with 39% YoY growth.
BEV contributed 38% to sales; India revenue share rose to 55% with railway diversification.

news.title:
Sona Comstar derives over 50% of revenues from India, offsetting global volatility.
Amid US tariff uncertainties, growth is expected from Europe and India.
news.summary:
Sona Comstar derives over 50% of revenues from India, offsetting global volatility.
Amid US tariff uncertainties, growth is expected from Europe and India.

news.title:
Sona BLW reported a strong Q3 performance despite North America business uncertainty.
The company highlights challenges but notes a resilient replacement cycle.
news.summary:
Sona BLW reported a strong Q3 performance despite North America business uncertainty.

news.title:
Sona BLW projects a Rs.235B order book, 71% from EVs.
